name: ebenova-legal-docs
description: Generate professional legal documents via API. 27 document types (NDAs, contracts, tenancy agreements) across 18 jurisdictions including Nigeria, Canada, UK, US, India, and more.
author: Ebenova Solutions <api@ebenova.dev>

tools.generate_legal_document: Generate a legal document (NDA, contract, tenancy agreement, etc.)
tools.extract_from_conversation: Extract structured fields from WhatsApp/email conversations

EBENOVA_API_KEY.description: Your Ebenova API key. Get one free at https://ebenova.dev/docs

EBENOVA_API_BASE.description: API base URL (optional, defaults to https://api.ebenova.dev)

examples.name: Generate an NDA
examples.prompt: Create an NDA between Acme Inc. and John Smith for a partnership discussion, 2 years, mutual, under Nigerian law

examples.name: Extract from WhatsApp chat
examples.prompt: Extract the key terms from this WhatsApp conversation and create a tenancy agreement: [paste conversation]

examples.name: List available documents
examples.prompt: What types of legal documents can you generate?
